Script.name: AreaPickerScript
Script.script:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- G_areapicker v4.4 (Mudlet Port) -- Persistence uses file-only state (g_areapicker_state.lua) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
if not string.trim then function string.trim(s) return (s:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")) end end
local state
-- ======================================================================================= -- OUTPUT HELPERS -- =======================================================================================
local function safe_cecho(text) if type(cecho) == "function" then local ok = pcall(cecho, text) if ok then return end end if type(echo) == "function" then local plain = text:gsub("<[^>]->", "") pcall(echo, plain) end end
local function msg(s) safe_cecho(string.format("<gold>[G_areapicker] %s\n", s)) end local function warn(s) safe_cecho(string.format("<tomato>[G_areapicker] %s\n", s)) end local function okm(s) safe_cecho(string.format("<LimeGreen>[G_areapicker] %s\n", s)) end
local function dbg(s) if state and state.debug_on then safe_cecho(string.format("<DodgerBlue>[AP:debug] %s\n", s)) end end
-- ======================================================================================= -- FILE-ONLY PERSISTENCE -- =======================================================================================
local STATE_FILE = "g_areapicker_state.lua"
local function persistence_dir() local home = (type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" and getMudletHomeDir() or ".") local dir = home .. "/persistence" if type(mkdir) == "function" then pcall(mkdir, dir) end if type(lfs) == "table" and type(lfs.mkdir) == "function" then pcall(lfs.mkdir, dir) end return dir end
local function get_state_file_path() return persistence_dir() .. "/" .. STATE_FILE end
local function serialize_value(v) if type(v) == "number" then if v ~= v or v == math.huge or v == -math.huge then return "nil" end return tostring(v) end if type(v) == "boolean" then return v and "true" or "false" end if type(v) == "string" then return string.format("%q", v) end if type(v) == "table" then local parts = {"{"} for k, val in pairs(v) do local key if type(k) == "string" then key = string.format("[%q]", k) elseif type(k) == "number" then key = "[" .. tostring(k) .. "]" end if key then local sval = serialize_value(val) if sval ~= "nil" then table.insert(parts, key .. " = " .. sval .. ",") end end end table.insert(parts, "}") return table.concat(parts) end return "nil" end
local function normalize_loaded_vars(source) source = type(source) == "table" and source or {}
local debug_on if type(source.debug_on) == "boolean" then debug_on = source.debug_on else debug_on = true end
return { level_offset = tonumber(source.level_offset) or 0, area_alignments = type(source.area_alignments) == "table" and source.area_alignments or {}, area_keys = type(source.area_keys) == "table" and source.area_keys or {}, alignment_filter = type(source.alignment_filter) == "table" and source.alignment_filter or {}, debug_on = debug_on, } end
local function looks_like_our_state(t) if type(t) ~= "table" then return false end return t.level_offset ~= nil or t.area_alignments ~= nil or t.area_keys ~= nil or t.alignment_filter ~= nil or t.debug_on ~= nil end
local function load_from_state_file() local path = get_state_file_path()
local file = io.open(path, "r") if not file then return normalize_loaded_vars({}) end file:close()
local chunk = loadfile(path) if chunk then local ok, loaded = pcall(chunk) if ok and looks_like_our_state(loaded) then return normalize_loaded_vars(loaded) end end
-- Backward compat: state files saved by an earlier build used Mudlet's -- table.save() format, which uses ref markers for nested tables and does -- not round-trip through a plain loadfile. if type(table) == "table" and type(table.load) == "function" then local ok, loaded = pcall(table.load, path) if ok and looks_like_our_state(loaded) then return normalize_loaded_vars(loaded) end end
return normalize_loaded_vars({}) end
local function save_to_state_file(payload) local path = get_state_file_path() local ok, err = pcall(function() local f = assert(io.open(path, "w")) f:write("return ", serialize_value(payload), "\n") f:close() end) if not ok then warn("Warning: failed writing state file: " .. tostring(err)) end return ok end
local function persist_load() local loaded = load_from_state_file() state.level_offset = loaded.level_offset state.area_alignments = loaded.area_alignments state.area_keys = loaded.area_keys state.alignment_filter = loaded.alignment_filter state.debug_on = loaded.debug_on end
local function persist_save() save_to_state_file({ level_offset = state.level_offset, area_alignments = state.area_alignments, area_keys = state.area_keys, alignment_filter = state.alignment_filter, debug_on = state.debug_on, }) end
-- ======================================================================================= -- STATE -- =======================================================================================
state = type(_G.GAreaPickerState) == "table" and _G.GAreaPickerState or {} _G.GAreaPickerState = state
if state.my_level ~= nil then state.my_level = tonumber(state.my_level) end state.level_offset = tonumber(state.level_offset) or 0 state.area_alignments = type(state.area_alignments) == "table" and state.area_alignments or {} state.area_keys = type(state.area_keys) == "table" and state.area_keys or {} state.alignment_filter = type(state.alignment_filter) == "table" and state.alignment_filter or {} if type(state.debug_on) ~= "boolean" then state.debug_on = true end state.areas = type(state.areas) == "table" and state.areas or {} state.original_area_names = type(state.original_area_names) == "table" and state.original_area_names or {}
local MAX_LEVEL_RANGE = 80 local ALIGNMENT_COLORS = { good = "yellow", evil = "red", neutral = "gray" } local REVERSE_ALIGNMENT_COLORS = {} for name, color in pairs(ALIGNMENT_COLORS) do REVERSE_ALIGNMENT_COLORS[color] = name end
-- ======================================================================================= -- HELPERS -- =======================================================================================
local function send_no_echo(cmd) if type(send) == "function" then send(cmd, false) end end
local function gmcp_level() if type(gmcp) ~= "table" then return nil end if type(gmcp.char) == "table" then if type(gmcp.char.status) == "table" and gmcp.char.status.level then return tonumber(gmcp.char.status.level) end if type(gmcp.char.base) == "table" and gmcp.char.base.level then return tonumber(gmcp.char.base.level) end end return nil end
local function update_level_from_gmcp() local lvl = gmcp_level() if lvl and lvl ~= state.my_level then state.my_level = lvl msg("Level updated to " .. tostring(lvl) .. " via GMCP.") end end
local function match_alignment_token(token) local map = { g = "good", good = "good", e = "evil", evil = "evil", n = "neutral", neutral = "neutral", } return map[token] end
local function output_link(text, command, hint, color) if type(cechoLink) == "function" then cechoLink(string.format("<%s>%s", color, text), command, hint or command, true) return end if type(echoLink) == "function" then echoLink(text, command, hint or command, true) return end safe_cecho(string.format("<%s>%s", color, text)) end
local function run_action(cmd) if type(expandAlias) == "function" then expandAlias(cmd) return end send_no_echo(cmd) end
local function print_area_line(item) local area = item.area local original_name = item.original_name local level_str = string.format("[%3d-%3d]", area.min, area.max) local level_color = state.area_alignments[original_name] or "cyan" local key = state.area_keys[original_name]
safe_cecho(string.format("<%s>%s ", level_color, level_str))
if not key or key == "" then safe_cecho(area.name) return end
local s, e = string.find(area.name:lower(), key:lower(), 1, true) if not s then safe_cecho(area.name) return end
local pre = area.name:sub(1, s - 1) local match = area.name:sub(s, e) local post = area.name:sub(e + 1) local action = "xrt " .. key
safe_cecho(pre) output_link(match, function() run_action(action) end, action, "yellow") safe_cecho(post) end
-- ======================================================================================= -- DISPLAY -- =======================================================================================
local function display_areas() dbg("Starting area display. Current offset: " .. tostring(state.level_offset)) if not state.areas or #state.areas == 0 then dbg("Area list missing or empty. Rebuilding area data.") parse_areas() end update_level_from_gmcp()
if not state.my_level then warn("Level not found via GMCP. Sending 'level' command as fallback.") send_no_echo("level") return end
if not state.areas or #state.areas == 0 then warn("Area data could not be loaded. Please reload the package.") return end
local target_level = state.my_level + state.level_offset local found_areas = {} for i, area in ipairs(state.areas) do if target_level >= area.min and target_level <= area.max then table.insert(found_areas, { area = area, original_name = state.original_area_names[i] }) end end
local filtered_areas = {} local filter_active = false for _ in pairs(state.alignment_filter) do filter_active = true break end
if not filter_active then filtered_areas = found_areas dbg("No alignment filter active. Total areas found: " .. tostring(#found_areas)) else dbg("Alignment filter active.") for _, item in ipairs(found_areas) do local color = state.area_alignments[item.original_name] if not color then table.insert(filtered_areas, item) else local alignment_name = REVERSE_ALIGNMENT_COLORS[color] if state.alignment_filter[alignment_name] then table.insert(filtered_areas, item) end end end dbg("Total areas after filter: " .. tostring(#filtered_areas)) end
safe_cecho("\n") if #filtered_areas == 0 then safe_cecho(string.format("<yellow>--- No suitable areas found for Level %d with the current filter ---\n\n", target_level)) return end
table.sort(filtered_areas, function(a, b) if a.area.min == b.area.min then return a.area.name < b.area.name end return a.area.min < b.area.min end)
local total_found = #filtered_areas local midpoint = math.ceil(total_found / 2) local LEFT_COLUMN_WIDTH = 60
local max_right_len = 0 for i = midpoint + 1, total_found do local item = filtered_areas[i] local level_str = string.format("[%3d-%3d]", item.area.min, item.area.max) local uncolored_len = #level_str + 1 + #item.area.name if uncolored_len > max_right_len then max_right_len = uncolored_len end end
local total_width = 2 + LEFT_COLUMN_WIDTH + 3 + max_right_len local offset_str = (state.level_offset ~= 0) and string.format(" (%d %+d offset)", state.my_level, state.level_offset) or "" local header_text = string.format(" Areas for Level %d%s ", target_level, offset_str) local header_dashes = total_width - #header_text if header_dashes < 0 then header_dashes = 0 end local left_dashes = math.floor(header_dashes / 2) local right_dashes = math.ceil(header_dashes / 2)
safe_cecho(string.format("<yellow>%s%s%s\n", string.rep("-", left_dashes), header_text, string.rep("-", right_dashes)))
for i = 1, midpoint do local left_item = filtered_areas[i] local left_level_str = string.format("[%3d-%3d]", left_item.area.min, left_item.area.max) local left_uncolored_len = #left_level_str + 1 + #left_item.area.name
safe_cecho(" ") print_area_line(left_item)
local padding = LEFT_COLUMN_WIDTH - left_uncolored_len if padding > 0 then safe_cecho(string.rep(" ", padding)) end
local right_index = i + midpoint if right_index <= total_found then safe_cecho(" | ") print_area_line(filtered_areas[right_index]) end
safe_cecho("\n") end
safe_cecho(string.format("<yellow>%s\n\n", string.rep("-", total_width))) end
-- ======================================================================================= -- AREA DATA -- =======================================================================================
local function parse_areas() state.areas = {} state.original_area_names = {} local function extract_area_name(rest) local value = rest if value:match("^%s*%d+%s+") then value = value:gsub("^%s*%d+%s+", "", 1) end
-- Aligned table data separates builder and area with 2+ spaces. local area_name = value:match("^.-%s%s+(.+)$") if area_name then return string.trim(area_name) end
-- Fallback for compact data where builder/area are single-space separated. area_name = value:match("^%S+%s+(.+)$") or value return string.trim(area_name) end
local area_data_string = [[ 1 5 Domain Kimr's Farm 1 5 Klauwaard Lowlands Paradise '96 1 10 Jehanine & Maar The Forest of Li'Dnesh 1 10 Domain The Path of the Believer 1 10 Timeghost Tournament Camps 1 15 Xcalibre & King Art of Melody 1 15 Rezit The Call of Heroes 1 20 Pentane & Chipp Hotel Orlando 1 20 Morrigu Land of Legend 1 20 Tsubaki Sen'narre Lake 1 20 Artemis The Land of the Beer Goblins 1 30 Drew Gallows Hill 1 40 Domain Jotunheim 1 201 1 Aardwolf Challenge Area 1 201 Sammael Fractals of the Weave 1 201 Lasher The Aylorian Academy 1 201 Aardwolf The Grand City of Aylor 1 210 Lasher A Bad Trip 1 210 Lasher Alagh, the Blood Lands 1 210 Lasher Gelidus 1 210 Lasher The Continent of Mesolar 1 210 Lasher The Dark Continent, Abend 1 210 1 Lasher The Laser Zone 1 210 Lasher The Southern Ocean 1 210 Lasher The Uncharted Oceans 1 210 Lasher The Warzone 1 210 Lasher Vidblain, the Ever Dark 1 220 Aardwolf Aardwolf Birthday Area 5 15 Aardwolf Commun Chaprenula's Laboratory 5 15 Nikkei & Nasdaq Siren's Oasis Resort 5 15 Tsubaki The Fire Swamp 5 15 Flat Doa The First Ascent 5 15 Valkur The Graveyard 5 20 Madrox Den of Thieves 5 20 Ardhiel & Tymme Giant's Pet Store 5 20 Aardwolf Commun Sundered Vale 5 20 Valkur The Amusement Park 5 20 Valkur The Chessboard 5 25 Vladia Child's Play 5 25 Calabus Dortmund 5 30 Aardwolf Commun Canyon Memorial Hospital 5 30 Tsubaki Fantasy Fields 5 30 C.A.W. Kerofk 5 30 Valkur The Gauntlet 5 30 Rundvelt The Wood Elves of Nalondir 5 35 Nalani & Ronnie A Magical Hodgepodge 5 35 Xoe Aardwolf Zoological Park 5 35 Lumina Brightsea and Glimmerdim 5 35 Aardwolf Commun Cloud City of Gnomalin 5 35 Zendalonii Olde Worlde Carnivale 5 35 Rundvelt The Infestation 5 35 Aardwolf Commun The Shadows of Minos 5 35 Zafirah The Town of Solan 5 35 Calabus Iker Te War of the Wizards 5 45 Aardwolf Commun Hatchling Aerie 5 50 Lumina Adventures in Sendhia 5 50 Aardwolf Commun Swordbreaker's Hoard 10 20 Gastro The Chasm and The Catacombs 10 20 Drakus Dras Lya Warrior's Training Camp 10 30 Zendalonii All in a Fayke Day 10 30 Plaideleon & Ki Guardian's Spyre of Knowledge 10 30 Aardwolf Commun Sho'aram, Castle in the Sand 10 35 Vladia Fort Terramire 10 35 Anonymous New Thalos 10 35 Moonbender Storm Mountain 10 40 Leaf Jungles of Verume 10 40 Khelda Wildwood 10 50 Rumour Dhal'Gora Outlands 10 50 Kali & Phalae The Temple of Shouggoth 10 201 Lumina Keep of the Kobaloi 15 30 Rhuli Aerial City of Cineko 15 30 10 Valkur Kul Tiras 15 30 Timeghost & Gim Necromancers' Guild 15 50 Silence The UnderDark 20 30 Aardwolf Commun Realm of the Zodiac 20 40 Domain Atlantis 20 40 Citron & Terril Death's Manor 20 40 Valkur Zafirah The Fractured Lands 20 40 Zafirah Weather Observatory 20 45 Aardwolf Commun The Maelstrom 20 50 Bellerophon Rhu Ancient Greece 20 50 Zendalonii Kingdom of Ahner 20 50 Rhuli Thandeld's Conflict 25 35 Dras Sheila's Cat Sanctuary 30 40 Lumina Mudwog's Swamp 30 50 Tir Cradlebrook 30 50 Valkur The Coral Kingdom 30 60 15 Vladia The Labyrinth 30 65 Domain Kingsholm 30 70 15 Aelfwyne Gold Rush 30 100 15 Rekhart The Imperial City of Reme 30 100 Gack The Silver Volcano 35 55 Strahd Descent to Hell 35 55 Aardwolf Commun Onyx Bazaar 35 60 Domain The Blighted Tundra of Andarin 35 85 25 Philondra Diamond Soul Revelation 40 50 15 Claire The Great Salt Flats 40 60 Xoe Raganatittu 40 60 Cajun Zafirah The Darkside of the Fractured 40 60 Derar & Lorelei The Wobbly Woes of Woobleville 40 60 30 Gastro Zangar's Demonic Grotto 40 70 20 Straw & Rampagn The Land of Oz 50 70 20 Vladia Paradise Lost 50 70 20 Jakalair The Flying Citadel 50 80 30 Valkur Castle Vlad-Shamir 50 80 30 Crazybabe Earth Plane 4 50 80 25 Kormregort The Old Cathedral 50 80 Rhuli Tilule Rehabilitation Clinic 50 100 24 Kali Rhuli Jenny's Tavern 50 100 30 Lumina Maerchyn Storm Ships of Lem-Dagor 50 100 24 Kali Rhuli The Yurgach Domain 60 80 Rumour Hedgehogs' Paradise 60 80 Falkon Pursia Plains of Nulan'Boar 60 80 30 Calabus The Goblin Fortress 60 80 30 Furdael The Great City of Knossos 60 80 40 Madrox The Killing Fields 60 80 30 Dreamfyre The Palace of Song 60 80 25 Dirtworm The Three Pillars of Diatz 60 85 Korridel Realm of Deneria 60 100 50 Valkur The Upper Planes 60 120 30 Randprin Redryn The DarkLight 60 120 35 Vanguard The Ruins of Diamond Reach 60 150 25 Citron Raymn Rosewood Castle 65 201 20 Domain & OrcWar Imperial Nation 70 90 Rumour Aardington Estate 70 90 40 Rayna The Tournament of Illoria 70 90 Accora Wayward Alehouse 70 100 50 SonRokito Lumin Nenukon and the Far Country 70 100 50 Valkur The Lower Planes 70 100 50 Leonassan Rhuli The Relinquished Tombs 70 110 40 Lantenon Tai'rha Laym 70 130 40 Ragnar The Empire of Talsa 70 130 40 Jeet & Trippita The Fabled City of Stone 70 140 50 Ragnar Northstar 80 90 70 Teleron The Keep of the Asherodan 80 100 Stutz Xadyen Kobold Siege Camp 80 100 65 Halo & Ikyu Snuckles Village 80 100 Atreidess The Gladiator's Arena 80 100 Domain The Realm of the Hawklords 80 100 50 Windjammer & Ja Wedded Bliss 80 110 50 Maerchyng Anthrox 80 110 50 Terrill & Citro Island of Lost Time 80 110 50 Lumina Timeghos Realm of the Firebird 80 110 Myrddin Svrogan's Logging Camp 80 130 60 Chade Deathtrap Dungeon 90 110 70 Schizo & Cera Pompeii 90 110 60 Jardin The Scarred Lands 90 120 50 Trenos The Monastery 90 125 40 Cirion & Mendy Dark Elf Stronghold 90 150 Alixana & Kalis Elemental Chaos 95 115 70 Calabus Halls of the Damned 95 115 Oladon Insanitaria 100 120 90 Guinness Ascension Bluff Nursing Home 100 120 100 Trepid Dusk Valley 100 120 90 Citron Faerie Tales 100 120 70 Zendalonii Seven Wonders 100 120 80 Gastro & Cariss Xyl's Mosaic 100 125 70 Lumina Maerchyn Prosper's Island 100 130 80 Ikyu & Halo Masquerade Island 100 200 60 Jubilee Teleron Into the Long Night 100 201 75 Taath & Bremen Sanctity of Eternal Damnation 105 125 Stutz Xadyen Gnoll's Quarry 105 125 60 Pursia & Falkon The Marshlands of Agroth 110 130 80 Teleron Arboretum 110 130 80 Rhuli Tairayden Peninsula 110 130 30 Daimbert The Stuff of Shadows 110 140 70 Paramore Living Mines of Dak'Tai 110 150 100 BlueKnight Christmas Vacation 115 135 80 Jardin The Misty Shores of Yarr 120 140 80 Citron Gilda And The Dragon 120 140 90 Vladia The Eighteenth Dynasty 120 140 70 Laren Raistlin The Sanguine Tavern 120 140 80 Tsubaki Verdure Estate 120 145 95 Kergin FireW The Slaughter House 120 150 100 Citron Faerie Tales II 120 150 90 Akirian House of Cards 120 150 90 Gastro & Dras The Archipelago of Entropy 120 160 100 Korridel & Guin The Uprising 120 170 90 SonRokito Lumin The Broken Halls of Horath 120 175 110 Blueknight The School of Horror 120 201 100 Philondra Corde The Amazon Nation 125 145 100 Rhuli Tumari's Diner 125 201 100 Lumina Vesse & The Blood Opal of Rauko'ra 125 201 110 Blueknight The School of Horror 130 140 115 Citron Foolish Promises 130 150 100 Rundvelt The Dark Temple of Zyian 130 150 100 Gamble The Drageran Empire 130 150 100 Blunt & Ciaran Tir na nOg 130 160 100 Saibot A Peaceful Giant Village 130 170 95 Zaister The Reman Conspiracy 130 175 100 Tai The Mountains of Desolation 130 201 110 Ragnar The Desert Prison 135 150 115 Windu & Maraude Desert Doom 140 160 Rhuli Imagi's Nation 140 160 110 Kahr Nanjiki Ruins 140 160 100 Daithi & Caoili The Abyssal Caverns of Sahuagi 140 160 100 Whitdjinn The Cougarian Queendom 140 170 110 Paramore Sagen The Gathering Horde 140 170 Vladia Unearthly Bonds 140 180 100 Cordelia Sagen The Empire of Aiighialla 140 201 115 Anne Takeda's Warcamp 150 170 130 Alhena Arisian Realm 150 170 130 Sammael Obyron Fellchantry 150 170 110 Zafirah Maarek Winterlands 150 180 120 Blackheart Battlefields of Adaldar 150 180 130 Tsubaki Sagewood Grove 150 185 150 Riot & Radrat Skeletal Remains 150 190 120 Lumina Jernau Rebellion of the Nix 150 201 120 Baktosh The Cataclysm 150 201 130 Domain The Ruins of Stormhaven 155 195 120 Dirtworm Black Lagoon 160 180 140 Broud & Guinnes Annwn 160 180 140 Mars & Sheol Dread Tower 160 180 130 Wilderness Helegear Sea 160 201 120 Kate The Covenant of Mistridge 160 201 130 Lumina & Darlat The Witches of Omen Tor 165 190 150 Rhuli Tribal Origins 170 190 140 Leaf Avian Kingdom 170 200 140 Paramore Falkon Empyrean, Streets of Downfall 170 201 Tir Eternal Autumn 170 201 140 Ragnar Lumina The Glamdursil 170 201 150 Faylen The Tree of Life 175 201 140 Sylvain Black Rose 175 201 150 Akirian Lumina Intrigues of Times Past 175 201 160 Zafirah Mount duNoir 175 201 135 Tai The Deadlights 175 201 140 Galos Lupercus The Keep of Kearvek 180 201 140 Korridel Artificer's Mayhem 180 201 Guinness Chakra Spire 180 201 160 Sammael Castiel Dunes in Gold 180 201 170 Rumour Tanra'vea 180 201 150 Trippitaka The Astral Travels 180 201 180 Sammael The Blood Sanctum 180 201 170 Valkur The Nine Hells 180 201 150 SonRokito Lumin The Partroxis 180 201 160 Dominian The Temple of Shal'indrael 180 201 150 Vokial & Ishkur Yggdrasil: The World Tree 190 200 150 Bottomfeeder Kiksaadi Cove 190 201 160 Drakus Entrance to Hades 190 201 180 Zendalonii Nottingham 190 201 175 Vilgan & Leaf The Council of the Wyrm 190 201 150 Valkur The Icy Caldera of Mauldoon 190 201 185 Lumina Kalince The Trouble with Gwillimberry 195 201 185 Sammael Dreamfy Crynn's Church 195 201 175 Rayna Umari's Castle 200 201 200 Nikkei Wire A Genie's Last Wish 200 201 Trepid Afterglow 200 201 150 Guinness & Robb An Auspicious Star's Zenith 200 201 175 Guinness Andolor's Ocean Adventure Park 200 201 200 Guinness and Ro Bloodlust Dungeon 200 201 170 Madrox Myrkul Fury City 200 201 200 Yowza Icefall 200 201 200 Quadrapus Journey to the Inferno 200 201 Tir Ketu Uplands 200 201 185 Yowza Nebulous Horizon 200 201 160 Rhuli Ookushka Garrison 200 201 201 Vilgan Oradrin's Chosen 200 201 Shaelynne Radiance Woods 200 201 180 Domain Realm of the Sacred Flame 200 201 190 Trepid Shadow's End 200 201 200 Redryn The Cracks of Terra 200 201 160 Calabus The Curse of the Midnight Fens 200 201 180 Valkur The Dungeon of Doom 200 201 175 Domain The Earth Lords 200 201 175 Madrox Rapscall The Nyne Woods 200 201 190 Rok Lumina The Realm of Infamy 200 201 200 Redryn & Koala The Titans' Keep 200 201 180 Valkur The Were Wood 200 201 180 Redryn Transcendence 200 201 Justme & Rumour Wayfarer's Caravan 200 201 Rezit Winds of Fate 200 220 Gastro & Ninja Qong 201 201 Castiel Black Claw Crag 201 201 201 Robbo & Guinnes Crossroads of Fortune 201 201 201 Sammael Quadrap Sea King's Dominion 201 201 201 Castiel White Claw Cavern 210 210 Aardwolf A Clearing in the Woods 210 210 Aardwolf Cathedral of the Elements 210 210 Aardwolf Dark Temple of Zhamet 210 210 Aardwolf Disciples of Hassan Clan Hall 210 210 Aardwolf Dominion Clan Area 210 210 Aardwolf Isle of Anglesey 210 210 Aardwolf Loqui Clan Area 210 210 Aardwolf Masaki Clan Area 210 210 Aardwolf Midgaardian Publishing House 210 210 Aardwolf Old clan holding area 1 210 210 Aardwolf Old clan holding area 2 210 210 Aardwolf Old clan holding area 3 210 210 Aardwolf Old clan holding area 4 210 210 Aardwolf Perdition Clan Area 210 210 Aardwolf Rogues Clan Hall 210 210 200 Aardwolf (Oby & Secret Imm Project #69 210 210 Aardwolf The Bard Clan 210 210 Aardwolf The Boot Lyceum 210 210 Aardwolf The Children of Ba'alzamon HQ 210 210 Aardwolf The Collective Mind of Tao 210 210 Aardwolf The Crimson Horde Clan Hall 210 210 Aardwolf The Crusader Clan 210 210 Aardwolf The Emerald Clan HQ 210 210 Aardwolf The Fortress of Knowledge 210 210 Aardwolf The Halls of Retribution 210 210 Aardwolf The Halls of Vanir 210 210 Aardwolf The Ivory City 210 210 Aardwolf The Legendary City of Tanelorn 210 210 Aardwolf The Order of Light 210 210 Aardwolf The Realm of Chaos 210 210 Aardwolf The S.S. Hook 210 210 Aardwolf The Shadokil Guildhouse 210 210 Aardwolf The Stronghold of the Imperium 210 210 Aardwolf The Twinlobe Clan HQ 210 210 Aardwolf The Underground Hall 210 210 Aardwolf The White Dragon Clan 210 210 Aardwolf The World of the Watchmen 210 210 Aardwolf The Xunti Cult 210 210 Aardwolf Touchstone Cavern 210 210 Aardwolf Twilight Hall ]]
for line in area_data_string:gmatch("[^\r\n]+") do local min_lvl, max_lvl, rest = line:match("^%s*(%d+)%s+(%d+)%s+(.+)$") if min_lvl and max_lvl and rest then min_lvl = tonumber(min_lvl) max_lvl = tonumber(max_lvl) if (max_lvl - min_lvl) <= MAX_LEVEL_RANGE then local clean_name = extract_area_name(rest) table.insert(state.areas, { min = min_lvl, max = max_lvl, name = clean_name }) table.insert(state.original_area_names, clean_name) end end end end
-- ======================================================================================= -- HANDLERS -- =======================================================================================
function AreaPicker_HandleLevelFallback(matches) state.my_level = tonumber(matches[2]) dbg("Fallback level trigger fired.") msg("Level detected via fallback as " .. tostring(matches[2]) .. ".") display_areas() end
function AreaPicker_HandleLvl() dbg("lvl command fired.") display_areas() end
function AreaPicker_HandleLvlIncrease(matches) local value = tonumber(matches[2]) if value then state.level_offset = state.level_offset + value persist_save() dbg("Level offset increased to: " .. tostring(state.level_offset)) msg("Level offset is now " .. string.format("%+d", state.level_offset) .. ". Settings saved.") end end
function AreaPicker_HandleLvlDecrease(matches) local value = tonumber(matches[2]) if value then state.level_offset = state.level_offset - value persist_save() dbg("Level offset decreased to: " .. tostring(state.level_offset)) msg("Level offset is now " .. string.format("%+d", state.level_offset) .. ". Settings saved.") end end
function AreaPicker_HandleLvlReset() state.level_offset = 0 persist_save() dbg("Level offset reset to: " .. tostring(state.level_offset)) msg("Level offset has been reset to 0. Settings saved.") end
function AreaPicker_HandleLvlAlign(matches) local partial_name = matches[2]:lower() local alignment = match_alignment_token(matches[3]:lower()) if not alignment then warn("Unknown alignment '" .. tostring(matches[3]) .. "'.") return end
local found_index, match_count = nil, 0 for i, area in ipairs(state.areas) do if area.name:lower():find(partial_name, 1, true) then found_index = i match_count = match_count + 1 end end
if match_count == 0 then warn("No area found matching '" .. matches[2] .. "'.") elseif match_count > 1 then warn("Multiple areas match '" .. matches[2] .. "'. Please be more specific.") else local original_name = state.original_area_names[found_index] local color = ALIGNMENT_COLORS[alignment] state.area_alignments[original_name] = color persist_save() dbg("Area '" .. original_name .. "' alignment set to " .. alignment) msg(string.format("Marked '%s' as %s. Settings saved.", state.areas[found_index].name, alignment)) end end
function AreaPicker_HandleLvlSetAlign(matches) local args = matches[2]:lower() state.alignment_filter = {} local valid_aligns = {} for align_word in string.gmatch(args, "%w+") do local mapped = match_alignment_token(align_word) if mapped then state.alignment_filter[mapped] = true table.insert(valid_aligns, mapped) end end
if #valid_aligns > 0 then persist_save() dbg("Alignment filter set to: " .. table.concat(valid_aligns, ", ")) msg("Display filter set to: " .. table.concat(valid_aligns, ", ") .. " (and unaligned). Settings saved.") else AreaPicker_HandleLvlSetAlignReset() end end
function AreaPicker_HandleLvlSetAlignReset() state.alignment_filter = {} persist_save() dbg("Alignment filter reset.") msg("Alignment filter cleared and saved. Displaying all areas.") end
function AreaPicker_HandleLvlKey(matches) local partial_name = matches[2]:lower() local keyname = matches[3] local found_index, match_count = nil, 0
for i, area in ipairs(state.areas) do if area.name:lower():find(partial_name, 1, true) then found_index = i match_count = match_count + 1 end end
if match_count == 0 then warn("No area found matching '" .. matches[2] .. "'.") elseif match_count > 1 then warn("Multiple areas match '" .. matches[2] .. "'. Please be more specific.") else local original_name = state.original_area_names[found_index] state.area_keys[original_name] = keyname persist_save() dbg("Area '" .. original_name .. "' key set to '" .. keyname .. "'.") msg(string.format("Marked '%s' with key '%s'. Settings saved.", state.areas[found_index].name, keyname)) end end
function AreaPicker_HandleLvlDebug(matches) local state_str = matches[2]:lower() state.debug_on = (state_str == "on") persist_save() okm("Debug mode is now " .. (state.debug_on and "ON" or "OFF") .. ". Setting saved.") end
function AreaPicker_HandleLvlHelp() local help_width = 80 safe_cecho("\n") safe_cecho(string.format("<yellow>%s\n", string.rep("-", help_width))) safe_cecho("\n G_areapicker Help\n") safe_cecho(string.format("<yellow>%s\n\n", string.rep("-", help_width)))
safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan> %-35s<ansi_white>%s\n", "lvl", "Shows areas for your current level.")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan> %-35s<ansi_white>%s\n", "lvl key \"<area>\" <key>", "Highlights a keyword within an area's name.")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan> %-35s<ansi_white>%s\n", "lvl align \"<area>\" <g|e|n>", "Marks an area as 'good', 'evil', or 'neutral'.")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan> %-35s<ansi_white>%s\n", "lvl debug on|off", "Toggles blue debug logs (auto-saved).")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan> %-35s<ansi_white>%s\n", "lvl increase <value>", "Increases the search level (auto-saved).")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan> %-35s<ansi_white>%s\n", "lvl decrease <value>", "Decreases the search level (auto-saved).")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan> %-35s<ansi_white>%s\n", "lvl reset", "Resets the level offset (auto-saved).")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan> %-35s<ansi_white>%s\n", "lvl setalign [g|e|n]...", "Filters display. Shows all if no args.")) safe_cecho(string.format("<cyan> %-35s<ansi_white>%s\n", "lvl help", "Displays this help message."))
safe_cecho(string.format("<yellow>%s\n\n", string.rep("-", help_width))) end
function AreaPicker_OnGMCP() update_level_from_gmcp() end
-- ======================================================================================= -- INIT -- =======================================================================================
local function init_areapicker() persist_load() parse_areas() update_level_from_gmcp()
if type(registerAnonymousEventHandler) == "function" then registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.status", "AreaPicker_OnGMCP") registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.base", "AreaPicker_OnGMCP") dbg("Registered GMCP handlers for gmcp.char.status/base.") end
msg("Addon loaded (v4.4). Type 'lvl help' for commands.") end
init_areapicker()
